title: Scan SCAGLOKSPK12 12 Pairs Knitshell Latex Palm Work Gloves Orange Size L
features: Ideal for many work situations, they provide protection against minimal cuts and abrasions
The gloves have a durable non-slip latex coating which provides excellent protection and grip
description: Product Description Scan Knit Shell Latex Palm Gloves are an essential garment for the protection of hands and offer maximum user comfort. Ideal for many work situations, they provide protection against minimal cuts and abrasions. The gloves have a durable non-slip latex coating which provides excellent protection and grip. Knitted wrists ensure comfort. - Excellent protection and grip - 10g Polycotton liner for comfort - Conforms to EN420 and EN388 EN388 Mechanical hazard 2 = Abrasion 1 = Blade Cut 4 = Tear 1 = Puncture X = 2nd Cut Size: L (9) W x L: 100 x 250mm Qty : 12 pairs Box Contains Knit Shell Latex Palm Gloves Orange Pack of 12 pairs
